title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 355.181 - Members
text:
355.181.  Members. — 1.  The articles or bylaws may establish criteria or procedures for admission of members.  No person shall be admitted as a member without his or her consent.
  2.  A corporation is not required to have members.
  3.  Except as provided in its articles or bylaws, a corporation may admit members for no consideration or for such consideration as is determined by the board.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1095) 
Effective 7-01-95
